content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving left, and the car appears to be on course slightly left of center entering the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 23 + 5 = 28
Waypoint 28: (7.099747, 1.146086)
Car position: (6.439429, 0.725554)
Bearing = atan2(1.146086 - 0.725554, 7.099747 - 6.439429) = atan2(0.420532, 0.660318) = atan2(0.6369) ≈ 32.47°
Current heading: 9.628°
Delta = 32.47 - 9.628 = 22.84° → moderate-to-strong left needed

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead with car slightly left of center; delta to waypoint 28 is +22.84° (left), so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve.",

    "Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)",
    "Car is nearly perfectly centered on track throughout the straight",
    "Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-25° entering curve at speed 1.5",
    "After the right curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves",
    "Waypoints 0-21 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",
    "Curve sharpens at wp27-32 (y increases from 1.0 to 1.7), may need more steering soon",
    "Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~9.6° confirming we are entering the left curve",
    "Delta ~23° at wp28 confirms entering the curve — maintain moderate left steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {

  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 22.84,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
